relationship.description: Each region can host multiple leagues; each league belongs to one region. Deleting a REGION cascades to its LEAGUE rows.
A charge person may manage many leagues; each league has one charge person.
Self‑referencing hierarchy: a parent league can have many child leagues. Deleting a parent LEAGUE cascades to its child leagues.
Each person that logs into the system has exactly one user account.
Audit records capture create/update/delete actions performed on a league.
Audit records capture create/update/delete actions performed on a region.

metadata.improvements_made: Added full datum‑tracking audit fields (created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, version_number) to REGION. Extended the generic AUDIT entity to capture changes for all entities and added a REGION‑AUDIT relationship. Documented cascade delete behavior for REGION→LEAGUE and LEAGUE hierarchical deletions. Retained the concise, efficient design and all previously strong relationships.
